title: helianthemum humile
intro: Helianthemum humile, also known as rockrose or dwarf rockrose, is a low-growing, shrub-like perennial plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Helianthemum humile include reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin infections, eczema, and digestive problems.
